end.description: The end date for filtering backfills.

per_page.description: The number of backfills to return per page.

rule_ids.description: A comma-separated list of rule identifiers.

initiator.description: The initiator of the backfill, either `user` for manual backfills or `system` for automatic gap fills.

start.description: The start date for filtering backfills.

sort_field.description: The field to sort backfills by.
